Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 9 (Mandatory Spares) 9 - 71 xii) Fuses 100 % of each type and rating. xiii) Cooling fans for power supply 10% or 2 nos. of each type and and cabinets model whichever is more 9.5.2 SG Related Sub-Systems i) Flame monitoring system a) Complete flame scanner assembly 20% or 2 nos., whichever is including scanner head assembly, more scanner housing & fibre optic cables b) Flame scanner lens 50% c) Electronic cards for scanners 10% or 2 nos. of each type whichever is more. d) Power supply modules 10% or 2 nos. of each type whichever is more. ii) Coal feeders a) Calibration motor 10% or 2 nos. whichever is more. b) Correction motor 10% or 2 nos. whichever is more. c) Motion monitor 10% or 2 nos. whichever is more. d) Speed pick-up 10% or 2 nos.
